instruction: Run these one at a time on a scratch branch with a fresh SDK build and restarted site/router services, or with the CI-managed intended startup. Revert each seeded regression after confirming the intended contract fails with the expected compact trace.

mutations.seededRegression: Bind the Email OTP registration bootstrap token to the pre-reroll wallet id or request a second bootstrap token during reroll.

phase3bProof.observedFailureCommand: pnpm -C tests run ensure:intended-google-token && SEAMS_INTENDED_SIGNING_SESSION_DEBUG=1 pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/email-otp.registration.contract.test.ts --reporter=line
phase3bProof.restoredValidationCommand: pnpm -C tests run ensure:intended-google-token && SEAMS_INTENDED_SIGNING_SESSION_DEBUG=1 pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/email-otp.registration.contract.test.ts --reporter=line
phase3bProof.localCommand: pnpm -C tests run ensure:intended-google-token && pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/email-otp.registration.contract.test.ts --reporter=line
phase3bProof.ciCommand: pnpm -C tests run ensure:intended-google-token && pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.ci.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/email-otp.registration.contract.test.ts --reporter=line

requiredHarnessEvidence: Email OTP registration did not reroll the initial wallet id

mutations.seededRegression: Drop or stale the refreshed spend authority after step-up so the first post-step-up signing action fails.

phase3bProof.observedFailureCommand: pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.registration.contract.test.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.unlock.contract.test.ts --reporter=line
phase3bProof.restoredValidationCommand: pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.registration.contract.test.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.unlock.contract.test.ts --reporter=line
phase3bProof.localCommand: pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.registration.contract.test.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.unlock.contract.test.ts --reporter=line
phase3bProof.ciCommand: pnpm -C tests exec playwright test -c playwright.intended.ci.config.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.registration.contract.test.ts e2e/intended-behaviours/passkey.unlock.contract.test.ts --reporter=line

mutations.seededRegression: Refresh the app session with a provider-user binding that does not match the wallet's export authority.

mutations.seededRegression: Reuse Tempo ECDSA signing material for Arc/EVM or Arc/EVM signing material for Tempo.
